DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP]
( 
	[BranchZipID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductGroupID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ZipCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_BranchZipID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_ProductGroupID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,	
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
